title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.41 — NEW FIRST-OPEN DEFAULT: NEAL - DEF - NEVE SUMM (user-authored: SUMMING amp with RICH NEVE iron only, everything else off, limiter off, CLEAN, 8x CLEAN OS — 'a good start'). Shipped: copied into Resources/Presets/NEAL_DEF_NEVE_SUMM.creosote, restamped to current DSP versions (9/6/4 — inert for this preset since those modules are OFF, keeps the presets-are-current-gen convention), added FIRST in kArtistRegistry + BinaryData accessor + CMake, editor first-open now loads it. Probe-measured +0.97dB vs bypass (the SUM_PREGAIN 0.5 = +1.02dB into the iron); trimmed LIM_LEVEL 0.5 -> 0.4731 (post-summing, iron drive untouched) -> -0.11dB = unity, consistent with the v0.4.40 matched library (now 24 presets). VERIFY IN ABLETON: fresh instance opens as NEAL - DEF - NEVE SUMM with SUMMING lit + IRON RICH; loudness matches bypass. OPEN: painted-metal chassis; deferred patina; LIMITER rename.
